creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 187021
Patch against svn r451590

Update CMake to latest upstream release. This is a minor bug-fix release -- the changelog suggests mostly polishing applied to the FindBoost module.

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run/

The diff against svn is attached, and is also available as https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12604
